The client cache does not publish exact random-effect multipliers for this enemy. Use the enemy effects guide for the global summary of what is exposed.

Open enemy effects guide

Equipment

  • Ship sprite/base stats: Enemy Bionic Queen lvl 85 Enemy Bionic Queen lvl 85
  • Engine: Enemy Dread Queen lvl 26
  • Loot: Bionic Implant, Big Metal Scrap, Advanced Data Chip, Artifact 100% (100% artifact chance), Radiated Junk, Bug Leg, Crate HoF Fulzar 80%, Crate Steel 5000 Iridium 600, Crate HOF 25%, Genetic Control Implant, Crate Steel 850 Iridium 225
  • Weapon: Enemy Bionic Lightning lvl 75 range 0-350
  • Weapon: Enemy Bionic Queen Cloud lvl 80 range 0-800
  • Weapon: Enemy Bionic Queen Zero Nova lvl 26 range 0-450
  • Weapon: Enemy Bionic Queen Zero Wave lvl 26 range 100-800
